vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: migrate:vbrief self-validation + slug-safe IDs + golden-file tests; hard-block on schema-invalid output per #506 D8.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief self-validation + slug-safe IDs + golden tests (#498)

narratives.Overview: Per #506 D8, migrator hard-blocks on schema-invalid output: exit non-zero, leave .premigrate backups in place, write partial output to vbrief.invalid/ (isolated from vbrief/). Slug-safe IDs per regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+(\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)*$ applied to filename AND in-JSON id. Real-fixture golden test added.
narratives.Problem: Migrator exits 0 despite producing schema-violating output. IDs contain spaces, slashes, dots, @. CI does not validate migrated output. Operators are told 'success' on broken state.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to: (A) run vbrief validation on all emitted files as last step; on failure, write partial output to vbrief.invalid/, leave .premigrate backups in place, exit non-zero with per-file diagnostics and rollback hint; (B) implement slug-safe sanitiser (lowercase ASCII + digits + - + _ + . as separator, collapse runs, strip leading/trailing hyphens, truncate to 80 chars with hash suffix if needed) used for BOTH filename slug and in-JSON id; disambiguate collisions. Add golden-file fixture under deft/tests/fixtures/pre_cutover_customized/ (SYNTHETIC, not slizard) with expected output. Wire vbrief:validate into tests/cli/test_migrate_vbrief.py.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_migrate_vbrief.py: validator runs on last step; schema-invalid output triggers exit non-zero + vbrief.invalid/ + backups preserved; all emitted IDs match regex; filenames and in-JSON ids are identical slugs; golden-file fixture round-trips byte-for-byte via canonical JSON re-serialisation; validator hooked into task check.
narratives.Outcome: Migration fails loudly on schema violations instead of silently producing broken state. IDs are universally slug-safe. Golden fixture prevents regression of every #495 finding caught by validation.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Migrator validates own output; hard-block on schema-invalid (exit non-zero, vbrief.invalid/, backups preserved)
Slug-safe ID sanitiser applied to filename AND in-JSON id; collision disambiguation
Synthetic pre-cutover fixture + golden-file test (no slizard data)
